Hi Tom. You always seem full of energy. What is your daily routine?
Well, I usually wake up early. I always go for a workout before breakfast.
Every day? That is impressive. Is your commute long?
It is often long, about an hour. So I sometimes take a short nap on the train.
Smart. And how do you unwind in the evening?
I often go for a stroll in the park. It is a good habit for my health.
Do you ever just relax at home?
On the weekend, yes. I catch up with friends, and I rarely do any chores.
I usually wake up early and go for a workout.
My commute always takes about thirty minutes.
I sometimes take a nap on the weekend.
After work, I often go for a stroll to unwind.
I never skip my morning coffee.

Hello, and welcome to your daily wellness minute. Here is a simple idea: small habits make a big difference. In the morning, try to always drink a glass of water before your coffee. During the day, take short breaks. Even a five minute stroll helps you unwind. If you feel tired after lunch, a quick nap is often better than another coffee. And remember, you rarely need a long vacation to feel better. A calm evening routine usually works just as well. Take care, and see you tomorrow.

Hi Ana Paula, it is Sarah. I hope you are having a calm week. Listen, I usually work on Saturdays, but this weekend I am free. Do you want to catch up? We could take a long stroll in the park, and then I need to do my groceries. I rarely have a full day off, so I really want to relax and enjoy it. On Sunday I always visit my mother, but Saturday is open. Call me back and let me know. Talk soon. Bye!

In the morning, I always drink my coffee first. I usually go for a short workout before work. My commute often takes about thirty minutes. In the evening, I sometimes go for a stroll to unwind. On the weekend, I catch up with friends and do the groceries.
